title: Trello - Generic
content:
A generic extract and enrichment playbook for incidents based on Trello Card data.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Adam Baumeister pack (Trello, community-supported).

Inputs — MoveToList: If set, after the investigation is concluded, the card will be moved to the given list id..

Integrations/scripts used: trello-add-comment, trello-update-card.

    propagationLabels:
    - all
id: Trello - Generic
inputs:
- description: If set, after the investigation is concluded, the card will be moved
    to the given list id.
  key: MoveToList
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: false
  value:
    simple: 605ac66f9f37c20f9f3205d9
name: Trello - Generic

  "6":
    id: "6"
    ignoreworker: false
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "9"
    note: false
    quietmode: 0
    scriptarguments:
      card_id:
        simple: ${incident.trellocardid}
      text:
        complex:
          accessor: Indicator
          filters:
          - - left:
                iscontext: true
                value:
                  simple: DBotScore.Score
              operator: greaterThanOrEqual
              right:
                value:
                  simple: "3"
          root: DBotScore
          transformers:
          - args:
              prefix:
                value:
                  simple: ' * '
              suffix: {}
            operator: concat
          - args:
              separator:
                value:
                  simple: |2+

            operator: join
          - args:
              prefix:
                value:
                  simple: |
                    ### XSOAR has extracted the following indicators from this card
              suffix: {}
            operator: concat
    separatecontext: false
    skipunavailable: false
    task:
      brand: ""
      description: Add a comment to a Trello card
      id: 52b39299-d69d-4ac5-89d3-4e8286f6a6fe
      iscommand: true
      name: Add Comment With Indicators
      script: '|||trello-add-comment'
      type: regular
      version: -1
    taskid: 52b39299-d69d-4ac5-89d3-4e8286f6a6fe

    type: regular
    view: |-

        "position": {
          "x": 650,
          "y": 1000
        }
      }
  "7":
    conditions:
    - condition:
      - - left:
            iscontext: true
            value:
              complex:
                filters:
                - - left:
                      iscontext: true
                      value:
                        simple: DBotScore.Score
                    operator: greaterThanOrEqual
                    right:
                      value:
                        simple: "3"
                root: DBotScore
          operator: isNotEmpty
      label: "yes"
    id: "7"
    ignoreworker: false
    nexttasks:
      '#default#':
      - "8"
      "yes":
      - "6"
    note: false
    quietmode: 0
    separatecontext: false

      version: -1

      text:

    separatecontext: false
    skipunavailable: false

      id: 4f492048-469e-4ffd-8c07-568f6b5999b0
